CustomField.description: The Appraised Leasehold Value from the most recent Appraisal record. This value copies automatically from the Appraisal record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Appraised Leasehold Value from the most recent Appraisal record. This value copies automatically from the Appraisal record.
CustomField.label: Appraised Leasehold Value
